entity.summary: Fully on-chain spot exchange on MegaETH using a Midpoint Anchored Order Book with current trading activity and protocol liquidity.
entity.notes: The official site is live and the protocol profile reports recent spot volume and TVL. Launch date remains null.

evidence.title: Canonic official website
evidence.notes: Official site describes a live fully on-chain spot exchange and links to the trading application and documentation.

evidence.title: Canonic protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Profile identifies Canonic as a MegaETH order-book DEX and reports recent volume and TVL.
